[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 01100011 4
2 10111110 6
3 11111111 a
4 10000001 2
5 10100000 2
6 01111011 6
7 01100011 4

01 10 01000010 2
12 21 01000011 3
23 32 00100010 2
34 43 10111110 6 match 2
45 54 10000001 2 match 4
56 65 10000000 1
67 76 00010000 1
70 07 00110000 2

02 20 01100010 3
13 31 00001010 2
24 42 01100011 4 match 1 7
35 53 10000000 1
46 64 11010110 5
57 75 00000000 a
60 06 01010110 4
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 00110110 4
14 41 01001011 4 match 0
25 52 00000001 1
36 63 10010110 4
47 74 00110000 2
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 01000010 2
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 01110110 5
15 51 00000001 1
26 62 01000010 2
37 73 00110000 2
